arts.ttl: 'The impact of defeat is massive' - what to look out for in Liverpool v Man City
arts.sum: BBC Sport previews Sunday's massive Premier League title game between Liverpool and Manchester City at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola labelled Phil Foden incident 'unacceptable' in X-rated dressing-room blast
arts.sum: Phil Foden and Pep Guardiola clashed as Manchester City slipped up against Crystal Palace last season, with a new documentary showing a furious rant the manager launched at the Englishman

arts.ttl: Guardiola asks for chance to turn Man City form around
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola says he has asked the Manchester City hierarchy for a chance to turn the club's form around, but will leave if he fails to do so.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals he relishes Liverpool's difficult games and insists 'it's helped' cut out complacency as Dutch boss prepares for Man City showdown
arts.sum: The hard-fought nature of Liverpool's victories under Arne Slot is preventing complacency seeping in at the runaway Premier League leaders.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola admits Man City's dire run is keeping him up at night - as under-pressure boss claims his title rivals are 'laughing' at the four-in-a-row champions
arts.sum: Five defeats and a draw is the worst sequence of the Catalan's managerial career. And things do not get any easier for City, who visit league leaders Liverpool on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola: If I can’t reverse Manchester City slide then I have to go
arts.sum: Guardiola takes his struggling side to Liverpool on Sunday.

arts.ttl: 'Disbelief' - Phil Foden opens up on Man City form ahead of Liverpool FC game
arts.sum: Manchester City star Phil Foden is looking to get his season started when the struggling Blues head to Liverpool on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot reveals true feelings about Pep Guardiola in six-word message
arts.sum: Liverpool welcome Manchester City to Anfield on Sunday with Arne Slot's side looking to extend their lead over their rivals in the Premier League, with Pep Guardiola's side in crisis

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola sends major Man City threat - just days after signing new contract
arts.sum: Manchester City are going through the biggest crisis of Pep Guardiola's managerial career, but he is armed with a new two-year contract - although that doesn't mean he won't walk away from the Premier League champions

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola admits Manchester City’s rivals will be laughing at their poor form
arts.sum: ‘I don’t sleep as good as when I won every game’ Manager does not blame Manchester City’s players Pep Guardiola accepts that Premier League rivals will be amused by Manchester City’s poor run of form in which the champions lost five matches in succession in all competitions as his side travel to Liverpool amid their worst spell under the Spaniard. City ended that series of defeats with a calamitous collapse against Feyenoord in midweek when they gave up a three-goal lead in the final 20 minutes to draw their Champions League game. They head to Anfield, having won there only three times since 1956, eight points behind the league leaders. Continue reading...
